invalidTime:
Invalid time format. Please use: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM (Central Time)
Example: 2026-03-15 3:00 PM

setup.cmdDescrp: Initializes and sets up the announcement module.
setup.mcRole: The Minecraft role to ping in announcements
setup.announcementRole: The role to ping in announcements
setup.notConfigured: Announcement settings not configured. Please run `/announcement-setup` first.

short.name: Short (5-10 minutes)
short.msg: This is a notice that the Minecraft server will be going down for server-side maintenance and updates in about 5 minutes! I'm hoping the server won't be down for super long, but will update in this channel if anything goes awry. Thank you for your patience.

long.name: Long (up to 1 hour or more)
long.msg: This is a notice that the Minecraft server will be going down for server-side maintenance **in about 1-2 hours**! It's honestly unknown how long this will take (could be 15 minutes, could be 1 hour). We will try our best to get everything back up in a reasonable time. Thank you for your patience.

scheduled.short:
{0} This is a notice that the Minecraft Server will be going down for server-side maintenance and updates at approximately <t:{1}:t>. We're hoping the server won't be down for longer than 5-10 minutes, but will update in this channel if anything goes awry. Thank you for your patience.

-# Times shown are in YOUR local timezone
scheduled.long:
{0} This is a notice that the Minecraft server will be going down for server-side maintenance and updates at approximately <t:{1}:t>. It's honestly unknown how long this will take (could be 15 minutes, could be 1 hour). We will try our best to get everything back up in a reasonable time. Thank you for your patience.

-# Times shown are in YOUR local timezone

time.cmdDescrp: Time in format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM (Central Time).

back-online.success: Updates were successful; server is back online!

time.cmdDescrp: Time in format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM (Central Time).

update-scheduled.msg:
The update itself shouldn't take too long, but no promises in case there are any issues. There will be another announcement once the server is updated and good to go.

*Times shown are in your local timezone*

version.cmdDescrp: Minecraft version that was updated to.

update-complete.msg:
• Everything seems to have been updated properly -- there really shouldn't be any bugs, but if anything seems seriously off just let us know!

Thank you for your patience!

create.success: Template created successfully! Here is a preview:
create.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of templates (25). Delete a custom template to make room.
create.duplicate: A template with that name already exists.
create.invalidName: Template name must be lowercase, start with a letter or number, and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens.
create.invalidColor: Invalid color format. Use hex format like #5865F2.

edit.success: Template updated successfully! Here is the updated preview:

delete.isDefault: Default templates cannot be deleted. You can edit them instead.

list.title: Announcement Templates
list.empty: No templates found. Run `/announcement-setup` to seed default templates, or create one with `/announcement template create`.

reset.confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all templates? This will delete all custom templates and re-seed the defaults.

send.templateNotFound: Template not found. Use `/announcement template list` to see available templates.
send.noTemplates: No templates found. Run `/announcement-setup` to set up the announcement system and seed default templates.

templates.scheduledDefaultMsg: The Minecraft server will be going down for server-side maintenance and updates. We will update this channel if anything goes awry.
templates.timezoneFooter: Times shown are in your local timezone
